notableEvents.label: Austin Hedges GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Austin Hedges out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
